meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: SaaS Starter Kits for Rapid Development
content.seo_description: Stop wasting time on boilerplate. Learn to use SaaS starter kits with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality client projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development cycles, adopt a battle-tested SaaS starter kit as your foundation. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you convert hours of manual boilerplate setup into minutes of high-value feature development, ensuring you ship robust SaaS products faster than competitors.
content.intro:
You’re staring at the clock, the deadline is creeping closer, and you’re still wrestling with authentication middleware and database schemas. Every hour spent on boilerplate is an hour you aren’t billing for, and frankly, it’s killing your margins. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-ticket agency isn't just talent; it's the infrastructure you bring to the fight.

We are shifting the paradigm. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, you reclaim your technical sovereignty. This guide isn't about writing code from scratch; it’s about orchestrating a development ecosystem where Antigravity handles the architectural heavy lifting and Claude Code executes the logic. It’s time to stop coding like a hobbyist and start building like a factory.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project using a clean, scalable starter kit that includes pre-configured Auth, Stripe integration, and ORM setups.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust SaaS foundation using the Next.js App Router, Prisma ORM, and NextAuth. Structure the project for high-scalability and multi-tenant support.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Define your schema and let AI handle the complex relational mappings to avoid common data integrity pitfalls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS, including tables for Users, Organizations, Subscriptions, and API Keys.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "npx prisma migrate dev --name init_saas_schema"

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
steps.description: Security is non-negotiable. Use automated logic to enforce strict RBAC across your API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that checks for 'admin' vs 'member' roles on all /api/admin routes.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Webhooks
steps.description: Handle billing events automatically to ensure your subscription logic is bulletproof from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler that listens for 'customer.subscription.updated' and syncs the database status.

steps.title: Deploy to Edge Infrastructure
steps.description: Finalize your CI/CD pipeline to ensure every push is automatically tested and deployed to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel-compatible pipeline configuration that runs unit tests before deployment.

pro_tips: Always wrap your AI-generated code in custom test suites; use Claude Code to auto-generate Vitest mocks for every new component.
Maintain a 'master' branch of your starter kit; push improvements back to it every time you finish a client project to compound your efficiency.
Use Antigravity to document your code as you write it; well-documented code reduces client maintenance questions by 80%.
Leverage environment variables for everything; never hardcode a secret, even in development, to prevent accidental leaks.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode on your own pull requests to catch logical inconsistencies before you even open the browser.
content.next_steps: Once your base is deployed, focus on building one 'killer feature' unique to your client's domain to differentiate your deliverable from standard templates.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from zero and start building for growth. Our starter kits are designed for speed, security, and maximum profit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
